REGISTER

  • Year Long Spaceholder Training

    A professional one-year multi-dimensional Spaceholder Training using the distinctions, thoughtware, and processes of Possibility Management. Before you can successfully build a Gameworld, or a Team, or a Bridgehouse, or a Growness, or a Nanonation, you need Spaceholder Skills.

    Hold Space
    Navigate Space

  • Introduction to the Year Long Spaceholder Training 2026-2027

    The global Archan gameworlds of Rage Club, Fear Club, Heart Gym, Possibility Coaching and Building Communication Bridges are leveling up their Spaceholder Training program from the original 6-to-8 week Spaceholder Training to a newly designed Year-Long Spaceholder Training.

    The introduction explains the source as well as the impact and depth of this shift. An open Space for your questions and feelings about who you are, and what your future might be as a Spaceholder for transformation, so please bring your most pressing issues!

    If you are interested to register for the YEARL LONG SPACEHOLDER TRAINING 2026-27, please watch this entire introduction before asking questions that have been answered then. Thank you!

  • Year Long Spaceholder Training 2026-2027

    The Stand

    We have learned that holding Space for these gameworlds goes far beyond being able to deliver effective sessions. You are commissioned to call forth unexpected Potentials in people who are longing to expand beyond tying to survive, beyond trying to fit into modern culture. This year-long path is where you will gain the agency to open personal culture-shift doorways to Archiarchy, where Adulthood is the foundation. As a Spaceholder you serve as a bridge to a culture which is entirely different from the culture in which your participants were born and raised.

    One focus of the year-long Spaceholder Training is to root yourself into the context of radical responsible Archiarchy as a source of aliveness to serve your extraordinary purpose. You will personally jack into the source of Rage Club, Fear Club, Heart Gym, and Possibility Coaching so that the experiences you create for others are authentic. Healing your hesitations, reactivities, and blocks about navigating these Spaces makes Space for your commitment.

    We want these initiations to integrate and activate within you over time.

    But more than that, navigating these gameworlds deeply connects you to an Extraordinary Team of Allies. This twelve-month training faces head-on into the hidden strategies that still prevent you from collaboratively creating with other geniuses. The skills of selfish generosity, abundant sharing of your discoveries, putting poop on the table, speaking out abruptly, holding your teammates to their authentic commitments, being on one team together, and being a force of aliveness in these global gameworlds are some of the joys we will share.

    Your desire to hold Space for Authentic Archan Adulthood Initiations is a reflection of the bigness of your heart and the inspiration of your vision. Now, let’s give you the Inner Structures and the tools to deliver your gifts with power, clarity, grace, and ecstasy.

    Dates

    Every Monday, from March 2, 2026 to February 22, 2027.

    Times

    From March 2 to 23, 2026, we meet from @6-8.30pm CET / 6-8.30am NZST (Tuesday morning) - check your time here.

    On March 30, 2026, we meet from @7-9.30pm CET / 6-8.30am NZST (Tuesday morning) - check your time here.

    From April 6 to September 21, 2026, we meet from @8-10.30pm CEST / 6-8.30am NZT (Tuesday morning) - check your time here.

    From September 28 to October 19, 2026, we meet from @7-9.30pm CET / 6-8.30am NZST (Tuesday morning) - check your time here.

    From October 26 to February 22, 2027, we meet from @6-8.30pm CET / 6-8.30am NZST (Tuesday morning)- check your time here.

    Time Commitment

    In addition to the 2h30 per week, there will be practices, and experiments plus EHPs that will block your evolution if you do not heal them.

    You will be invited to join a 3Cell as your accountability and aliveness Team. How often and how long you meet is up to you.

    There may be temporary additional practice spaces offered by fellow participants. Again, it is up to you to decide to pratice there.

    Plus, the possibility of participating in in-person meetings during the year.

    The YLST is demanding, not only in terms of hours, but also in terms of liquid states. This is not something you do sometimes on the side. This is equivalent to joining a year-long university program.

    Price #1

    Payment in one or multiple installments before March 2, 2026.

    Sliding scale between 1500-2000€.

    Price #2

    Payment in two installements every 6 months.

    Sliding scale between 850-950€.

    Price #3

    Payment in four installements every 3 months.

    Sliding scale between 450-550€.

    Price #4

    Payment in twelve installements every month.

    Sliding scale between 165-200€.

    Requirements

    The Year Long Spaceholder Training is an intense context upgrade into Radical Responsibility. For you to responsibly be able to say 'Yes' to this, it requires that you have enough experience of said context. Therefore, you have already participated in:

    1 Expand The Box Training

    1 Possibility Lab

    1 Rage Club (online or offline)

    Price

    The above prices apply to residents of USA, Europe (all), New Zealand, and nomadic Possibilitators.
    They also apply to residents of Central and South American countries who
    earns on average 900 Euros or more/month (~5000 reais/month).
    A different price will be negotiated for residents of Central and South
    American countries with lower income. Please reach out to Anne-Chloé for that information.

    Payment

    1. Please do not use reference in your transfer. If your bank requires it, please write "Thank you!"
    2. Before making the transfer, please reach out to me - Anne-Chloé, so I can give me the instruction for the payment.
    3. If you need an invoice, it is possible with a 10% surcharge fee.

    Cancellation policy

    This is an Archan training. The cancellation policy depends on what is needed and wanted according to ECCO, where you are on your Path, the feedback and coaching that you are asking for, your ability to have integrity and make commitment, and a hundred of other unpredictable factors. To be clear, we will not use refunding or not refunding money as a form of punishment.

    Welcome to the Path of Radical Responsibility!

    However, in general, if you cancel four weeks before the training starts you will receive a full refund of your payment.

    Registration

    Please fill in the form linked below to register for the Year Long Spaceholder Training. Your registration is complete with the payment of your first installment.

    REGISTER HERE

  • The Rules of Engagement

    Archan Universe-City

    The Year Long Spaceholder Training is the official start of an Archan Universe-City.

    The context is Archiarchy in radical responsibility. You are joining a giant experiment is starting-over with the Learning Path of Becoming a Spaceholder. We are building new memetic and relational infrastructures for a training environment that results in empowered, courageous, healthy, generous, kind and powerful human beings. The emotional baggage and energetic signatures that you may still carry from your jailtime in modern school do not apply to the Archan Universe-City. When your projections reveal themselves, we will use them as stepping stones for thoughtware upgrades, healing and evolution.

    The YLST is a playground for and with geniuses. There is infinite gameworld and proposal space for Archiarchy to thrive. Your stand and commitment defines how much you play, what kind of offers you make to the YLST, and what you will 'get' from this space.

    Your Teams

    Your main team is the group of spaceholder-in-training joining the Year Long Spaceholder Training.

    Your secondary team is your 3Cell, otherwise called your Accountability and Aliveness Team. Your 3Cell will shift during the year so that you experience different feedback, coaching and possibility. You decide as a Team for what purpose and research you will empower each other, how often and how long you meet.

    Then, there is YOUR Possibility Team. Your Possibility Team is a Team of minimum 3 people (not participants of the YLST) that YOU hold space for during the YLST. You meet weekly for minimum 1h30. You charge 10 €/$ per person. If you have 4 people on average paying 10€, every week you make 40€, every month you make 160€ that just about covers the price of the monthly cost of your YLST fee.

    During the Team, you practice the spaceholder skills you are learning in the YLST. And every week, your participants receive possibilities for evolution and transformation. Plus, Archiarchy expands and deepens into the hearts and beings of the people around you.

    A Possibility Team is not mandatory to join the YLST. And, what better place to immediately apply your training?

    Team Work

    You are only as good as your team is.

    An Archan Spaceholder does not exist alone. There is no such thing as an apple. And, there is no such thing as an Archan spaceholder. You exist as a part of an ecosystem. When the ecosystem thrives you thrive. This undermines everything that you have learned in modern culture about playing the double-sided game of 'I Win-You Lose' Lone-Wolf competition all the while being adaptive to strangers in hopes that you fit in.

    Radical Responsibility means Radical Empowerment, Radical Fun, Radical Authenticity, Radical Reality. You enter a culture where unpredictable acts of Love, Generosity, Togetherness and Creation are available at any moment, and especially in crisis, through the unwavering but simple Clarity that those acts are possible. In these moment of Grace, a Team emerges from the ordinary into the Archetypal.

    The YLST is a space to practice the Wise Selfishness skill of saying what you want to become a healthy cell of a living organism.

    Stewardship & Guardianship

    Here, there are no authorities to rebel against. There is no police to fear. There are no punishments to avoid by lying, sneaking, or cheating. There is no hierarchy to climb for safety and protection. There are no grades to achieve to prove your superiority.

    What there is is Radical Reality: what is, is - where you are is where you are, with no stories attached.

    Your evolution as a spaceholder will be limited by any need to know and be a 'good student'. This Training is a space to discover who you are when you no longer use rules, morals, shoulds, musts, and punishment-based beliefs to direct your creation.

    Your own path is designed by your desire for practice, your hunger for possibility, your willingness to be in liquid state through feedback and coaching, and the stand that you are. The door is wide open for your unpredictable experimentation, teambuilding, project-creation, and unreasonable Quests.

    No one can go through these doors for you. More interestingly, no one can stop you from going through these doors as long as you see it and are at the door. If you see a door and are at the door, but do not go through the door, this door may never presents itself to you again.

    You are entering a training in Radical Responsibility where choices of where you put your attention, love and energy have consequences.

    What we offer is this: a space where Archetypal Forces to work through to invent and unfold the distinctions, thoughtware upgrades, memetic worlds, processes, humour, nonlinear proposals, and possibilities for what you are meant to hold space exists, thrives, expands and blesses others.

    The YLST is an evolving memetic 'Jungle Gym'. On a Jungle Gym, you do not get to go every where, but you get to go to places where school, corporations, governments and your parents never took you. Along the way, you will be trained to build such Jungle Gyms for your people according to your Bright Principles. This will be your Stewardship training.

    There are many contexts to be a part of. Radical Responsibility is a specific context that creates incredible results. In joining, you will receive specific kinds feedback about where you and what you are creating in relationship to Radical Responsibility. And, you will also practice becoming sensitive to when survival strategies and old thoughtware try to undermine the possibility of Possibility and how to build the bridge for people to walk towards Life if they so desire. This will be your Guardianship training.

    Work Where You Are

    We are intentionally extending the shift of context of Becoming a Spaceholder to one year to give you the time to work where you are. The journey of Becoming is a Phoenix Process. Your solid identity will die more than one time during this year long training, so that you - your Being - will ressurect in more loving, clear, powerful, collaborative shapes than ever before.

    If it turns out that you are working the same 'edge' or feedback for a couple of months, then that is where you are. That is also the only place that you can do your work. Trying to be somewhere else than where you are in the surest way to pressure yourself into a Fantasy World before collapsing into your well-known Swamp. The YLST is the space for you to work where you are through practices, experiments, Emotional Healing Processes, and Initiations.

    An important part of the YLST will be to dismantle Fantasy Worlds that you may carry about yourself, the Path, what it means to be a spaceholder, or being part of a Team, what it means to 'fail' or 'succeed' so that you can enter Radical Reality as yourself and with others.

    In-Person Trainings

    The in-person meetings are a chance to experience, invoke, and test your ability to cavitate, hold, navigate, and vanish transformational spaces for yourself and others while being in collaborative creation in a Team. They are a ground for the Natural and Free Adult Play. They are the birthplace of local Archan villages and meshworks.

    The in-person meetings are not mandatory. But the question is, if you are not participating in them, why not? What is blocking you? What part of are you hiding or afraid to reveal? Why do you think that part is not already visible?

    The in-person meetings are organized by you, participant in the YSLT.

    It only takes one to take a stand for a practice space. You say 'I want this to exist' and follow through your commitment.

    Then invite one or more Spaceholder-Trainers-in-Training and empower them to become who they say they are ('Spaceholder Trainer'). Give them jobs to do, make demands on them for what you want to learn from them. Request that they become your net when you are practicing your spaceholding incompetences. Ask them to be the space through which the context of Radically Responsible Gameworlds can speak, for your benefit and the benefit of the next generation of spaceholders. Destroy the hierarchy in yourself by empowering your empowererers.

    For example, they could be four in-person trainings in Europe during the YLST, organized by four different teams with four different focus. It could be that there are as many in Brazil organized by the Brazilian Village. Or in New Zealand. One could happen in Ecuador as part of a Bridgehouse. Or in the United States as the beginning of an Archiarchy Invention Center. An in-person training could be the kick-off of an entire new Archan Gameworld.

    These in-person trainings are up to you. They are empowered by the Spaceholding Team of the YLST.

    No Certificate

    In Archiarchy, there are no certificates. There are no experts, no black belts, no masters or mastery. There is no place where 'you have made it'. No one is untouchable. No one is immune to feedback and coaching.

    At the end of the Year Long Spaceholder Training, you will not receive a diploma giving you permission to deliver Rage Club, Fear Club, Heart Gym or Possibility Coaching. What there is, is what you can do and what you cannot do. Those things are obvious when looking at the results of what you are creating in your life in regards, for example, to a loving relationship, money, team, visibility, vulnerability, synchronicity, generosity and gameworld building.

    What you can source during the Training is what you will be able to source outside the training.

    What Is Possible?

    What is possible from the YLST is a global meshwork of authentic professions that serve High Drama - conscious purpose that serves life - are things like:

    • Heart Gyms replacing shoe shops and liquor stores in the downtown walking zone.
    • Rage Club and Fear Club studios for women to reclaim their center, voice and bodies from the Patriarchy. For that all domestic violence, rape, and terrorized girls stop forever. For women to flourish into the essential aliveness that sustains life of a village.
    • Unmixing Emotions clinic for Connection and Clarity instead of anti-depressants and suicide as a response to the insanity of modern culture.
    • Geniuses taking back their Authority to reorganize their local governments into Circular organizations using Torus Technology.
    • Emotional Healing Processes as a basic skill for any edgeworking gameworlds.
    • Profesionnal Emotional Healers in the emergency departments of hospitals, in doctor offices, rehabilitation clinics, maternity wards, pediatrician offices, any kind of medical profession to train and empower 3 Phase Healing using the intelligence and energy of the Feelings and Emotions for Life.
    • Feel For Life Trainers in unschooling, homeschooling, freeschooling, Montessori, and Steiner schools. A profession in school to train children as young as 7 years old to inner navigate their Conscious Feelings so that young girls are not vulnerable in the hands of unguarded boys, so that young boys do not have to be left at the tightening grips of the Patriarchy, so that children learn to negotiate what they want with each other and with adults, so that their mission can come to life as soon as they shift from mom to the world (around 7-8 years old). Young adults have the exact needed energy to be the guardian of Planet Earth. Watch Peter Ellyard's clarity about this.
    • An entire new webs of connection between human beings that are centered on sourcing, exchanging and celebrating Nonmaterial Value instead of extraction, profit and ultimately money.
    • For you to become a spaceholder at the level of your community, your village, your town, your region and transform the hierarchical divided political system into a circular-Torus-Technology, creation-based, responsibility-centered infrastructure that serves Gaia, the land, the people, the future and not corporations.
    • Normalize Conscious Creation as a natural effect of growing up, and not limited to a special few chosen ones.
    • Establish a global context for the stewarding and guardianship of a Gaian Constitution in the form of a meshwork of Radically-Centered nanonations. A nanonation thrives when there is at least one spaceholder or a ring of spaceholders (the Infinity Ring) that declares it to exist in the morphogenetic field of the human race.
    • Re-vitalize Intentional Communities, Ecovillages, Communes, Permaculture Projects, and other self-authorize regenerative projects with simple and clear distinctions such as Box, Gremlin, Feelings and Emotions, Emotional Healing Processes, Authentic Adulthood Initiation, and clarity about Context. There are 300 million cultural creatives on our Team in this massive shift of consciousness. What is possible is for us to be radically on their team for them to Win.
    • Hold a 'Beyond War' Intervention Team that intervenes in any situation of conflicts, separation, and warmongering to Hit Bottom and stay there together.
    • Obsolete-Gameworlds Demolishers Teams specializing in training people to take apart their own ecocidal gameworlds.

    What do you want to exist?

    Who Could You Be During The YLST?

  • Spaceholder Codex

    Radical Responsible Spaceholder Codex

    Rage Club, Fear Club, Heart Gym, Building Communication Bridges, and Possibility Coaching are doorways to Archiarchy. They are not an end destination where people learn things like “three steps for managing their anger or communicating with their partners”. By holding these spaces, you are holding open a door for people that is the start of a new life that is more Radically Responsible because they have their voice back. Similarly, being a Spaceholder for Radically Responsible Spaces (RRS) is not an end destination. It is an evolutionary path, where you continue undergoing the initiations that you need to go through so you can be more capable of empowering the circle around you from a truly Radically Responsible context.

    9 INITIATIONS for RADICALLY RESPONSIBLE SPACEHOLDERS:

    • Participant in Rage Club

    • Stellated Rage

    • Participant in Fear Club

    • Stellated Fear

    • Participant in Expand the Box

    • Participant in Possibility Laboratory

    • Rage Club Spaceholder Training

    • Gremlin Transformation Chapter 0

    • Drug Use:

    1) At least 3 months sobriety from Marijuana, alcohol, psychedlic drugs / plant medicine, nicotine.

    2) At least 12 months sobriety from "hard" drugs like cocaine, heroin, etc.

    3) For those on psychotropic drugs (anxiolytics, antidepressants, antipsychotics, mood stabilizers): Have a long-term, 0-pressure plan in place to become drug-free. By long-term, I mean it might take 2 years or more, but they are still persistently walking in that direction. By 0-pressure, I mean going at the pace of a brain healing from having been on psychotropic drugs.

    The 9 initiations created some reactions mainly about sobriety from psychedelics. What I have heard about this is mostly something like “Psychedelics can open a doorway into Archetypal domains.” I have experienced that myself. What is more interesting to me than debating whether or not psychedelics are “okay” so there is a rule about it that we can all follow is asking questions that serve my evolution. These might be something like “What would it take for me to become someone who can source the Archetypal domains I am accessing with psychedelics by myself? What would it take for me to change my Box so that instead of relying on ingesting something to become looser, or be more loving, or be more connected to people, that I become like that all the time?”

    The 9 initiations are not meant to be criteria that you check off. They are meant to be doorways for your continued evolution.

    1. Have you removed the blocks you have to consciously using your anger? Do you have your Space back, your authority back, your voice back, in a way that no one can take them away? Have you cut your energetic cords and made your boundaries with parents, teachers, partners, friends, governments, and cultures? Are you able to stand in your own clarity and deliver what you have to say with empowerment and clarity to your participants, and without being adaptive or shrinking?

    2. Are you on the old or new map of fear? Do you have the ability to bring your fear down to nearly 0%, or is there unconscious fear constantly running your life? Do you have the ability to ride the roller coaster of fear and use it to sense doorways that are there, tools to invent, what the next thing to say is, what wild mage moves there are for you to make? Do you love your fear? Do you hear what it has to tell you and follow it? Is your fear your ally?

    3. Have you been through the core initiations of an Expand the Box? Have you experienced the insanity of giving your life over to stories? Are you done believing your own stories to be true? Do you know about your Box and Gremlin such that you are not identified with them? Can you see past the Box and Gremlins of those around you? Can you invoke something else in them? Can you Choose, Ask, and Declare so that you can source what is needed in a Space?

    4. Have you experienced Archiarchy and what happens when people are collaborating in a Radically Responsible context? Have you started the incredible quests that are out there for you, like to complete things with your mom and dad, to claim the jewels of your Underworld, to escape the 8 prisons, to journey to the center of the Earth, to speak with your Archetypal Lineage, to open the Pearl, and more?

    5. Have you experienced what high level anger, above 90%, feels like? Have you spoken and raged from that place? Do you get it that you will not die if you turn the taps of your anger on fully? Do you get it that your anger is a resource, that it is energy for your Archetypal lineage?

    6. Have you experienced what high level fear, above 90%, feels like? Can you feel it in your toes and in the top of your head? Do you get it that you will not die if you feel your fear? Do you get it that your fear is a resource, that it is energy for your Archetypal lineage?

    7. Have you become an experimenter who can source new discoveries about conscious anger? Do you know how your Box wants to limit the Rage Clubs you hold? Can you sidestep and move faster than your Box? Do you know what specifically in your lineage is trying to come through your Rage Clubs? Are you unhookable? Can you turn ordinary Spaces or problem conversations into the extraordinary? Can you sense the next experiment for people? Can you speak into their Being and invoke their potential for serving Gaia? Can you rattle Boxes and catch Gremlins? Can you set Context for a Space so that Gremlins do not even show up? I

    8. Is your Gremlin running your life? Are you asleep at the wheel? Are you avoiding responsibility? Are you reactive? Are you playing games with people? Is your life filled with Low Drama? Are you unable to distinguish that something else could be possible?

    9. Are you outsourcing responsibility for expanding your Box to substances? Are you using them to numb out or to temporarily circumvent your incompetencies? Are you looking for highs? Are you avoiding feeling? Are you on brain drugs? Are you destroying the ability for Matrix to form and stabilize in your bodies? Are you poisoning yourself? Are you confusing Child or Gremlin level responsibility for the Archetypal? If so, get sober from alcohol, marijuana, hard drugs, and psychedelics. Take your authority and ability to create back from these drugs. Do not give up on your ability to source your own aliveness. Go through whatever EHPs it takes. If you are on psychotropic drugs (anxiolytics, antidepressants, antipsychotics, mood stabilizers): Have a long-term, 0-pressure plan in place to become drug-free. By long-term, I mean it might take 2 years or more, but they are still persistently walking in that direction. By 0-pressure, I mean going at the pace of a brain healing from having been on psychotropic drugs.

    The Money Part

    The purpose of delivering RRS is not to ‘make money’ (also known as to ‘make a profit’). If you think it is, you are playing in the wrong gameworld. Making a profit is a suicidal, corporate-driven purpose that is exterminating life on planet Earth at the fastest rate possible. If you have any doubt about this, please watch The Corporation and The New Corporation: The Unfortunately Necessary Sequel.

    Are you still working a corporate job, a slave to the thoughtware that you need money to live? Delivering RRS provides immense value to the world and to your participants. Why spend time at a valueless corporate job to earn money instead of delivering high-value RRS?

    The way out of the money gameworld is not to fight against it, but rather to replace the value of money in your personal life with values that are more closely connected to your true nature, and then to actually create those values. Then YOU represent true value rather than selling your soul to deal in the illusion of money. Delivering RRS is a true value.

    RRS are not free. RRS cannot be free because, first and foremost, it costs the highest price a human being can pay: their make-believe identity.

    The purpose of charging a monetary price for RRS is Radical Empowerment.

    First, you empower your participants. For them to receive the value that you have to offer, they first need to sacrifice something, to make space in themselves to hold what you are offering. Money is, for now, the most effective and understandable sacrifice that we have found. Second, when a participant pays, it creates a bond between them and you which is more difficult for their Box and Gremlin to break by not showing up to your Rage Club. When someone pays, they want value in return. Consequently, they will be more authentically invested, they will ask questions and take more risks. Finally, as an agent of transformation, money is one of the resources that supports you to deliver your next work. The money generated by delivering RRS will support you until your next transformational value-exchange space (“Toss a coin to your Witcher”).

    When you become a Spaceholder for a gameworld already establish, you agree to the rules of engagement and make proposals to improve them according to their Bright Principles. Such rules are made to not let your Gremlins your pricing.

    For example,

    1. Using price differences to compete with other or ‘take or keep participants’ away from other spaceholders. There are 8 billion clients waiting for you! There is no scarcity in Radical Responsibility.

    2. Raising the minimum of the sliding scale because you may are snapped into the modern culture illusion of money scarcity no matter how much money you have.

    3. Lowering the minimum of the sliding scale because you are afraid of your own value, or you think you may be “more successful if more people join, or you to rescue people from their own scarcity.

    Each gameworld has its own Rules of Engagement regarding pricing.

    The Evolutionary Team Part: Apprentice and Empowerment Team

    We invite you to reach out to other RR Spaceholders so that we can be on each other’s Team to discover and hold Space for our next Evolutionary doorways and together guard the value of the RRS you hold space for. There are two types of people who may want to join your Evolutionary Team:
    - Apprentices. Those are people who are on the Path of becoming a Spaceholder. They pay full price.
    - Empowerment Team. These are people who are already RRSpaceholders, and they want to deepen their skills while being on your team to give you feedback and coaching. Their empowerment is their payment, they do not pay money to get in.

  • Radical Relating with Rage Club Spaceholders

    Witness the aliveness of a team of Spaceholders whose point-of-origin is in Radical Responsibility. They take the risk to open doors of transformation and aliveness where no one might have dared before. Why? Not for their own fame. But for the authentic and simple pleasure to see their fellow human come to life in their Love and Care of the world through their Rage. After watching this video, please register Matrix Code NCRADIOx.xx in your free StartOver.xyz account at login.startover.xyz. This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

  • Space

    WHAT IS CONSCIOUSLY HELD SPACE?

    The term 'Space', in the Possibility Management sense, refers to the fabric of the Universe.

    Everything you do, be, are, and can become takes place in Space.

    For most people on Earth, the existence and quality of the Spaces they live, play, and work in is invisible. This means their life, play, and work Creations are Unconscious and, therefore, for the most part, serve Unconscious Purposes.

    It should be excruciatingly obvious to you by now that serving Unconscious Purposes leads quite directly to the extermination of life on planet Earth.

    Since the Universe is made out of Consciousness, each Space is filled with Potentials and Possibilities which are available as a resource for Conscious use by participants in the Space. In the Spaces you consciously Cavitate, Hold, and Navigate, the resources of Potentials and Possbilities are infinite because consciousness is fractalized. What limits you is the quality of your requests and Proposals.

    Becoming aware of the Potentials and Possibilities, and gaining the Spaceholding Skills needed to call forth, apply, unfold, and activate the Potentials and Possibilities, does not occur by accident. These skills are not taught in school or university, not even at graduate levels.

    Spaceholding Skills emerge painfully, one step at a time, through Authentic Adulthood Intitiatory Processes, through hundreds of effective Emotional Healing Processes, (EHP), through a life of Practice, through methodically and persistently building extraordinary forms of Matrix, all within a Consciously established Training Team Context that is saturated with the Distinctions needed for Navigating the related evolutionary Liquid States.

    Consciously Cavitating, Holding, and Navigating Space includes first, a direct Experiential connection with the Consciousness of Space. This, alone, depends on a worldview change that contradicts most of what modern western culture teaches in terms of science, psychology, and religion.

    Your direct connection with Consciousness requires stabilizing in an Adult Egostate that is Decontaminated from Child, Parent, Gremlin, and Demon Egostate influences, which itself depends on a successful Gremlin Transformation procedure.

    Additionally you need a firm ability to determine the dimensions of the Space being held, the Context of the Space being held, and the Purpose of the Space being held. This depends on you developing a strong Inner Structure and clearing up your Thoughtware, for example, removing Beliefs, Expectations, Fantasy Worlds and calibrating your Compass of Reality.

    The Spaces you Hold and Navigate also need protection, archetypal energy and information sources, cleansing, and closure. These procedures require additional awarenesses and skills. How do you acquire accurate perceptions and Creation skills for determining all of these? Spaceholder Training.

    WITHOUT A SPACEHOLDER, THERE IS NO SPACE.

    Human interaction happens within an energetic space. Without a spaceholder, there is no space.

    These days, most human spaces serve unconscious purposes, such as ‘making a profit’, ‘being right’, ‘being the best’, ‘complaining’, ‘being miserable’, ‘competing against others to see who has the worst life’, or ‘being safe’.

    But even an unconscious space has a spaceholder, and this person may not always be the apparent ‘leader’. Sometimes, someone else is ‘pulling the strings’ from behind the scenes. If you are in a human interaction and you do not know who the spaceholder is, you are in an unconsciously held space. Unbeknownst to yourself, you may be the actual spaceholder, shaping and shifting the interactions according to your unconscious parts.

    The spaceholder holds immense power. You frame the space. You choose what level of responsibility is being taken (setting the Context). You decide the purpose. You shape the culture being created between people, and ultimately the human cultural field of Earth.

    The space determines what is possible. But the spaceholder determines the space!

    This means you can cavitate and inhabit spaces on Earth that have never existed before. This is the job of a Possibilitator in Archiarchy.

    As a spaceholder, you establish who each person can be in your space. You delineate what options are available to choose from for how to be, how to relate, and how to create. You define how your Team relates to their past. Most of you may have already experienced that when you upgrade your spaceholding awareness, you come to life in entirely new ways. And not only you, but other people as well.

    What an incredible opportunity! Scary too!

    If you have always wanted to do magic, start learning about spaceholding.

    It becomes exhilarating when you realise that there are so many spaces that do not yet exist that harbor magnificent unknown potentials. Unexplored human potentials lay dormant within you and others until someone takes a stand and says, ‘I want this to exist’. The good news is that it only takes one for a new space to emerge and for those potentials to come to life.

    For example, you could become a spaceholder for a practice space. Having a space that is clearly dedicated to practice is indeed a rare and precious thing. It is not a space for stories, problems, or complaints. As a spaceholder, you simply ask, ‘And with that, what are you practicing?’ Someone could practice being centered, or the Feelings Form for creation, or radical relating. If you do not interrupt someone who stopped practicing, you have shifted your spaceholding into a different space that now has the purpose of ‘being adaptive’.


    Possibility Management specializes in accessing new unchartered spaces and unleashing new human potentials. No, Possibility Management is not about feelings work! We do feelings work to stabilize in the adult egostate, where Possibility Management can really begin! Together we are learning and practicing the tools, distinctions, thoughtmaps, and processes for better exploring human Possibility!

  • Spaceholder Experiments

    No one can prepare you for you.

    More interestingly, no one can stop you from preparing yourself.

    Preparing yourself centers on Building Matrix for collecting more consciousness.

    With more consciousness, you see more options to choose from, including the frightening ones.

    Then you can be Radically Responsible and Play Full Out.

    What you decide, however, is still up to you.
